title: Paul Smith
compiled_truth: Paul Smith is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (1999-11-19 to 2002-01-03), Paul Smith sent 7 and received 89 emails, totalling 96 interactions. Top correspondents: [David Minns](people/david-minns) (5), [Paul Quilkey](people/paul-quilkey) (3), [Raymond Yeow](people/raymond-yeow) (3), [Vince Kaminski](people/vince-kaminski) (2), [David Forster](people/david-forster) (2).
